---
title: "Rapport qualité de l'air — Pays de la Loire"
format:
  typst:
    papersize: a4
    margin:
      x: 2cm
      y: 2cm
jupyter: python3
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
start_date = "2026-07-16"
end_date = "2026-07-22"
```

```{python}
import os
import sys
from pathlib import Path

backend_dir = Path.cwd().parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(backend_dir))
os.environ.setdefault("DB_PATH", str(backend_dir / "var" / "db" / "reports.db"))
os.environ.setdefault("DATA_DIR", str(backend_dir.parent / "data"))

import geopandas as gpd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import Markdown

from app.core.config import get_settings
from app.db import get_connection

conn = get_connection()
readings = pd.read_sql_query(
    """
    SELECT hr.insee_code, hr.qualificatif_score, hr.source_date, c.commune_nom, c.dept_nom
    FROM hourly_readings hr
    JOIN communes c ON c.insee_code = hr.insee_code
    WHERE hr.source_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date
    """,
    conn,
    params={"start_date": start_date, "end_date": end_date},
)
conn.close()
```

Période : **`{python} start_date`** → **`{python} end_date`**

```{python}
#| output: asis
if readings.empty:
    print("Aucune donnée disponible pour cette période.")
```

## Évolution de l'indice

```{python}
#| fig-cap: "Indice ATMO moyen quotidien (1 = bon, 6 = extrêmement mauvais), région Pays de la Loire"
daily = (
    readings.groupby("source_date")
    .agg(indice_moyen=("qualificatif_score", "mean"), communes_couvertes=("insee_code", "nunique"))
    .reset_index()
)

if not daily.empty:
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(6.5, 3))
    ax.plot(daily["source_date"], daily["indice_moyen"], marker="o", color="#b3541e")
    ax.set_ylim(1, 6)
    ax.set_ylabel("Indice moyen")
    ax.set_xlabel("Date")
    plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha="right")
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()
```

```{python}
#| output: asis
if not daily.empty:
    table = daily.round(2).rename(
        columns={
            "source_date": "Date",
            "indice_moyen": "Indice moyen",
            "communes_couvertes": "Communes couvertes",
        }
    )
    display(Markdown(table.to_markdown(index=False)))
```

## Carte — indice moyen par commune

```{python}
#| fig-cap: "Indice ATMO moyen par commune sur la période (grisé = pas de donnée)"
commune_avg = readings.groupby("insee_code")["qualificatif_score"].mean().reset_index()

communes_path = Path(get_settings().data_dir) / "geo" / "communes_pays_de_la_loire.geojson"
communes = gpd.read_file(communes_path)
communes = communes.merge(commune_avg, on="insee_code", how="left")

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(5.5, 5.5))
communes[communes["qualificatif_score"].isna()].plot(
    ax=ax, color="#e0e0e0", edgecolor="white", linewidth=0.3
)
covered = communes[communes["qualificatif_score"].notna()]
if not covered.empty:
    covered.plot(
        ax=ax,
        column="qualificatif_score",
        cmap="YlOrRd",
        vmin=1,
        vmax=6,
        edgecolor="white",
        linewidth=0.3,
        legend=True,
    )
ax.set_axis_off()
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
```

## Communes les plus dégradées

```{python}
#| output: asis
worst = (
    readings.groupby(["insee_code", "commune_nom", "dept_nom"])["qualificatif_score"]
    .mean()
    .reset_index()
    .sort_values("qualificatif_score", ascending=False)
    .head(10)
)

if not worst.empty:
    table = worst.round(2).rename(
        columns={
            "commune_nom": "Commune",
            "dept_nom": "Département",
            "qualificatif_score": "Indice moyen",
        }
    )[["Commune", "Département", "Indice moyen"]]
    display(Markdown(table.to_markdown(index=False)))
```
